evals.prompt: Run /update-starter in this project and see if anything needs updating or auditing
evals.expected_output: tools/update_deps.py --list runs first, then --interactive, then all 5 audits in sequence (deps, types, security, lint, build), then generate_report.py

assertions.assertion: All 5 audit tools ran in order
Self-healing: bun run fix was called if lint failed

evals.prompt: Audit this project and update any outdated packages to the latest version
evals.expected_output: update_deps.py ran (list → interactive/ AskUserQuestion → update), then all 5 audits ran, then report generated
